steps.title: Extend the Or31 discovery
steps.content: The passage presents EBF as promising because it repels mosquitoes by activating one receptor, Or31, which is present in all known disease-carrying mosquito species. The conclusion should turn that finding into a research strategy.

steps.title: Avoid unrelated next steps
steps.content: Choice B focuses on extracting EBF, not developing new repellents. Choice C maps receptor locations, which is not presented as the obstacle. Choice D looks for the maximum number of receptors, moving away from the single-receptor insight. The answer is A.
